# Ethereum Classic (ETC)

> Ethereum Classic is the only mature Proof-of-Work blockchain with native smart contracts.

Full context for AI agents: https://ethereumclassic.com/llms-full.txt

## About

Ethereum Classic (ETC) is a decentralized, open-source blockchain platform that runs smart contracts. It is the original Ethereum chain, maintaining the principle of "Code is Law" after the 2016 DAO fork. ETC uses Proof-of-Work consensus with the ETCHash mining algorithm and has a fixed monetary policy with a capped supply of ~210.7 million ETC.

## Key Facts

- Ticker: ETC
- Chain ID: 61 (mainnet), 63 (Mordor testnet)
- Consensus: Proof-of-Work (ETCHash)
- Block time: ~13 seconds
- Supply cap: ~210.7 million ETC
- Current block reward: 2.048 ETC (Era 5, blocks 20M–25M)
- Block reward reduction: 20% every 5 million blocks ("fifthing")
- Smart contracts: EVM-compatible (Solidity, Vyper)

- [Fork History](https://ethereumclassic.com/upgrades) — Network upgrade history (Atlantis → Olympia)

## Emission Schedule ("Fifthing")

ETC reduces its block reward by 20% every 5 million blocks under ECIP-1017. This event is called a "fifthing" (not "halving"). The 5th fifthing will reduce the reward from 2.048 ETC to 1.6384 ETC per block.

- Era 1 (0–5M): 5 ETC
- Era 2 (5M–10M): 4 ETC
- Era 3 (10M–15M): 3.2 ETC
- Era 4 (15M–20M): 2.56 ETC
- Era 5 (20M–25M): 2.048 ETC ← current
- Era 6 (25M–30M): 1.6384 ETC ← next fifthing

## Olympia Network Upgrade

Olympia is Ethereum Classic's next hard fork: the most significant upgrade in the network's history. It introduces EIP-1559 dynamic fee market, a protocol-controlled treasury funded by basefee revenue (block rewards remain untouched), on-chain governance with soulbound NFT voting, and full EVM alignment with Ethereum's Fusaka execution layer.

Three client-facing ECIPs: ECIP-1111 (EIP-1559 Fee Market), ECIP-1112 (Protocol Treasury), ECIP-1121 (EVM Compatibility). Contract layer ECIPs: ECIP-1113 (DAO Governance), ECIP-1114 (ECFP Funding Process).

**ECIP-1121 — EVM Compatibility:** Advances the ETC execution layer through Dencun (Cancun-Deneb), Pectra (Prague-Electra), and Fusaka (Fulu-Osaka). ETC implemented partial London EIPs in Mystique (2022) and partial Shanghai EIPs in Spiral (2024), deferring the EIP-1559 fee market for independent governance design. ECIP-1111 delivers those deferred London fee market EIPs (EIP-1559 + EIP-3198). ECIP-1121 delivers the remaining execution-layer EIPs from Dencun, Pectra, and Fusaka that are independent of Proof-of-Stake and blob data availability.

Included EIP categories:
- Gas & State Access: EIP-7702 (account delegation), EIP-7623 (calldata cost), EIP-7825 (gas limit cap), EIP-7883 (MCOPY price fix), EIP-7935 (jumpdest removal)
- EVM Safety: EIP-6780 (SELFDESTRUCT restriction), EIP-7934 (stack size enforcement), EIP-7910 (call target constraint)
- Cryptographic Precompiles: EIP-2537 (BLS12-381 for ZK-friendly proofs), EIP-7951 (P256VERIFY for WebAuthn / passkeys)
- Execution Context: EIP-5656 (MCOPY memory copy), EIP-2935 (historical block hashes in state), EIP-1153 (transient storage TSTORE/TLOAD)

Explicitly excluded: all blob-dependent EIPs (EIP-4844, EIP-7516, EIP-7691). Ethereum Classic is a pure Layer 1 execution chain.

Two active clients at Olympia launch:
- Fukuii — Primary client for the Olympia era. Purpose-built for Ethereum Classic.
- Core-Geth — Legacy ETC client, maintained through Olympia.

Activation block: TBD (announced after CDC-23 community call).

## Networks

- Mainnet RPC: https://etc.rivet.link
- Mordor Testnet RPC: https://rpc.mordor.etccooperative.org
- Block Explorer: https://etc.blockscout.com

## Regulatory Positioning

- United States: digital commodity classification under the CLARITY Act (CFTC jurisdiction)
- United States: Proof-of-Work EVM platform for regulated stablecoin deployment under the GENIUS Act
- European Union: decentralized asset under MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation), exempt from issuer obligations as a fully decentralized protocol
- Japan: recognized crypto-asset on the FSA Green List (JVCEA), fast-track listing across all Japanese regulated exchanges

## Olympia Ecosystem Properties

- https://olympiadao.org — Governance landing page
- https://olympiatreasury.org — Treasury monitoring dashboard
- https://app.olympiadao.org — Proposal submission, voting, and execution
- https://ethereumclassicdao.org — Institutional (Ethereum Classic DAO LLC)
- https://github.com/olympiadao — Open-source governance repositories
